title: Graphic Designer
mcp_workflow: Firefly (generate from prompt) → image_vectorize → asset_preview_file (deliverable: SVG/AI + PNG variations)
inputs: Industry / what the brand does (1-2 sentences)
Style direction: modern / vintage / playful / luxurious / minimalist
Style references (URLs or attached images) — optional
Symbol vs. wordmark vs. combination preference
desc: I'm looking for a graphic designer to help rebrand my clothing and apparel printing business. The project includes: • Creating a new logo and brand identity • Designing apparel graphics for T-shirts and sweatshirts • Creating print-ready and embroidery-friendly designs • Developing designs that fit my brand style and target audience Design examples I'm interested in: • Coffee-themed designs • Mama-inspired designs • Overthinker designs • Exhausted Mom designs • Trendy, minimalist, and lifestyle-inspired apparel graphics These designs will be used for embroidery, puff print, DTF printing, and other apparel decoration methods, so experience creating production-ready artwork is preferred. Please send your portfolio, especially any apparel, embroidery, or clothing brand designs you've created. I'm looking for someone I can work with long-term as my business continues to grow. Please send your portfolio, especially any apparel, embroidery, or clothing brand designs you've created. I'm looking for someone I can work with long-term as my business continues to grow.

title: Cipta Logo Unik dan Menarik -- 2
mcp_workflow: Firefly (generate from prompt) → image_vectorize → asset_preview_file (deliverable: SVG/AI + PNG variations)
inputs: Industry / what the brand does (1-2 sentences)
Style direction: modern / vintage / playful / luxurious / minimalist
Style references (URLs or attached images) — optional
Symbol vs. wordmark vs. combination preference
desc:
Saya sedang mencari idea logo baharu untuk sebuah projek kreatif. Reka bentuk perlu:

• Segar, mudah diingati, dan berfungsi baik di media digital serta cetakan.  
• Diserahkan dalam format vektor (AI atau EPS) berserta PNG lutsinar beresolusi tinggi.  
• Disertakan versi berwarna dan hitam-putih.

Warna, tipografi, dan gaya terbuka—saya ingin melihat kreativiti anda. Sertakan penjelasan ringkas tentang konsep di setiap penyertaan. Saya akan memberikan maklum balas pantas agar anda boleh memperhaluskan reka bentuk sebelum pemilihan pemenang.

title: Canva Designer Needed for Clothing Brand
mcp_workflow: search_design (Express, social) → fill_text → Firefly for image OR change_background_color → image_crop_and_resize per platform → asset_preview_file
inputs: Brand assets: logo, brand colors, fonts
desc: Hi, I'm looking for a Canva designer to create a few simple social media posts for my clothing brand. This is a small task to start with, but there may be more work available if we're a good fit. I already have the content and brand style in mind. I just need someone who can turn the ideas into clean, attractive designs that match the brand's look and feel. If you're interested, please send a few samples of your work and tell me a little about your experience with Canva. Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Social Media Assistant for Brand Building
mcp_workflow: search_design (Express, social) → fill_text → Firefly for image OR change_background_color → image_crop_and_resize per platform → asset_preview_file
inputs: Brand assets: logo, brand colors, fonts
desc: We are plumbing, home renovation, building company. I need a social media assistant to help build my brand across platforms like TikTok, Threads, Instagram, Facebook, and my website. The role involves creating engaging content, managing social media accounts, and developing strategies to enhance brand visibility and engagement. The ideal candidate should have experience in social media marketing and content creation. General construction knowledge is preferable

title: Daily Promotional Video Editing
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file → image_apply_auto_tone → image_adjust_brightness_and_contrast → image_adjust_color_temperature → image_adjust_hsl
desc:
Fresh promotional footage lands on my desk every day, and I need it shaped into an engaging, public-facing video within 24 hours of delivery. Your main tasks are straightforward:

• Trim and sequence the raw clips into a clear, dynamic story  
• Blend in background music that suits the message (I can supply tracks or you can source royalty-free options)  
• Sync and balance the provided voice-over so it sits cleanly in the mix  
• Export a polished 1080p (or higher) MP4 plus the editable project file

The style should feel lively and accessible to the general public—nothing overly corporate or niche. Smooth transitions, tasteful color correction, and the occasional caption or lower-third are welcome if they help keep viewers’ attention, but the core priority is quick, consistent turnaround and audio-visual polish that makes each spot ready to post the same day it’s filmed.

Raw clips and voice-over arrive via shared drive each afternoon; simply drop the finished files back in the folder and let me know they’re done. If this daily rhythm fits your workflow, I’m ready to start right away.

title: Expert Video and Photo Editor Required
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file → image_apply_auto_tone → image_adjust_brightness_and_contrast → image_adjust_color_temperature → image_adjust_hsl
desc: I am looking for a talented and creative video editor to help me with my video projects. I will provide the raw footage, and I need someone who can cut it smoothly, add good transitions, color grade, and enhance the overall quality. High-quality output and timely delivery are highly preferred. Please share your portfolio or past work samples with your proposal.I am looking for a professional photo editor to enhance and retouch my images. The work involves color correction, sharpening facial features, cinematic lighting adjustments, and background clean-up to deliver high-resolution, professional-looking images. Photoshop expertise is required. Please share your previous work samples.I need an experienced video editor to create engaging Instagram Reels and Shorts. The job includes cutting raw clips, adding trending music, syncing audio, and adding text captions/subtitles to make the content highly engaging. If you have experience in creating viral short-form content, please apply with your best samples.

title: Ice Cream Festival Presentation Design (From Scratch)
mcp_workflow: search_design (Express, presentation) → fill_text per slide → image_remove_background (for visuals) → asset_preview_file
desc: Description: We need a designer to create a visually stunning presentation for a public ice cream festival event in Qatar. Event Details: Event name: Doha Summer Ice Cream Festival 2026 Location: Old Doha Port, Doha, Qatar Dates: July 29 – August 4, 2026 Expected exhibitors: 30+ brands Slides needed (11 slides): Cover – Event name, location, dates Event Overview Organizer Profile – Who We Are / Our Mission / What We Do Venue Description Festival Visuals – How it Will Look (3 slides) Exhibitor Profile – 3 categories: Ice Cream & Gelato / Desserts & Sweet Concepts / Cold Beverages Exhibitor Count Contact Slide Style: Fun, vibrant, summer festival feel. Playful but professional. Deliverables: Editable PowerPoint (.pptx) PDF export Full content will be provided as text after hiring.

Ideal candidate has 3+ years of experience with pitch decks, investor decks, or business presentations. Please include similar portfolio samples with your proposal. Start your proposal with the word “Perhaps” so I know you read the full job description.

title: Looking for a graphic designer to make flyers for my company.
mcp_workflow: search_design (Express, flyer) → fill_text → image_remove_background (subject) → asset_preview_file
inputs: Event/product details: title, date, time, location, price, CTA
Format: digital / print (mention DPI & paper size)
desc: Hi, so I run a company and have been making promo flyers for it myself. They're not bad (See attached) and they have done INCREDIBLY well as Meta ads... But I just don't want to spend time on graphic design anymore. So I'm looking for someone to take over. There are several flyers that I need for my business, so looking for someone to become my reliable go-to flyer maker. If you have your own style, great. If you want to copy the style I have already, awesome. I just like bright colors that pop and fun visuals. Message me and lets get started! If you're 420 friendly, its a plus, as my business is in that field.

title: Modern Product Poster Design
mcp_workflow: Firefly (hero artwork) → search_design (Express, poster) → fill_text → asset_preview_file
desc:
I’m looking for a fresh, eye-catching poster that will advertise one of my key products. The look I’m after is distinctly modern and clean—minimal clutter, strong hierarchy, and plenty of white space so the product stays front and center.  

Here’s what I need from you:  
• One print-ready poster for product advertising (preferred size 18"×24", but advise if another dimension suits best).  
• Source file in Adobe Photoshop (layered PSD) or, if you prefer, Canva with full editing rights.  
• High-resolution PDF (CMYK, 300 dpi) ready for professional printing.  
• Web-ready JPEG/PNG for online use.  

Please incorporate my brand colors and logo (I’ll supply assets on award). If we nail this piece, I’ll likely roll the same style out across banners or additional promotional materials down the road, so consistent, reusable design choices matter.  

Send over a brief note on your concept, turnaround time, and any relevant samples that match a modern, clean aesthetic. I’m ready to get started as soon as I find the right fit.

title: Make font different color
mcp_workflow: Firefly (hero artwork) → search_design (Express, poster) → fill_text → asset_preview_file
desc: Hello! I made this poster on ChatGPT, which I really like, but every time I prompt the app to make the sentence at the bottom wider, so you can read it better, it gives me back the same poster, but deforms my face. I need this exact poster I uploaded, but the color of the font at the bottom to be much more legible, so just a little whiter at the bottom.

title: Fiction Book Cover Scheme Design
mcp_workflow: Firefly (artwork) → search_design (Express) → fill_text → asset_preview_file (3000×3000 for music, KDP specs for books)
desc: Design a versatile fiction book cover template/scheme for a young publishing imprint. The template should accommodate a wide array of fiction styles and allow for a strong brand continuity between titles. The brand already has logo, website, graphic elements, etc., and has published non-fiction books. The design should signal intellectual daring and seriousness, without becoming too austere. The design should be adaptable to different fiction genres (rather than book series) while maintaining a cohesive look that represents the imprint's brand. The ideal candidate will have experience in book cover design and a strong understanding of branding principles. A full brief is attached.

title: MM Romance Book Cover Design
mcp_workflow: Firefly (artwork) → search_design (Express) → fill_text → asset_preview_file (3000×3000 for music, KDP specs for books)
desc: Seeking a talented designer to create a captivating cover for a MM romance novel. Front cover, full wrap for paperback and hardcover, and a smaller one for audiobook. The cover should convey the emotional depth and intimacy of the story, appealing to fans of the genre, while also making it clear that the story takes place in Scotland. The ideal candidate will have experience in book cover design, particularly for romance novels, and a keen eye for detail. The project requires creativity and an understanding of current design trends in the romance genre. Bonus points for being able to depict an adorable Highland cow. Budget negotiable for qualified designer.

title: Restaurant Menu
mcp_workflow: search_design (Express, menu) → fill_text (items + prices) → asset_preview_file
desc: Looking for a creative, vibrant, and appetizing one-page menu design for a fast-food burger restaurant named "SmashBurger".Concept: Retro, street-food style, or rustic chalkboard feel.Sections needed: Classic Burgers, Specialty Burgers, Sides, and Beverages (Just use placeholder text/prices for now).Must include space for high-quality food photos.Deliverables: High-res JPEG and print-ready PDF.

title: Fast-Food Menu Illustrator Design
mcp_workflow: search_design (Express, menu) → fill_text (items + prices) → asset_preview_file
desc:
I need a sharp, modern menu designed in Adobe Illustrator for a fast-food restaurant. We already have a full brand style guide, so the colors, fonts, and overall layout imagery from that guide must come through clearly in the final piece.

Scope  
• Design a clean, eye-catching menu that organizes items, descriptions, and prices in a way that is easy to read at a glance.  
• Reflect our fast-food vibe while staying 100 % on brand—use the specified color palette, typography, and visual hierarchy from our guide.  
• Prepare both an editable .AI file for future updates and a press-ready PDF for immediate printing.

What I’m looking for  
You’re comfortable in Adobe Illustrator and have an eye for typography, spacing, and hierarchy. Past work creating restaurant menus, brochures, or other print collateral will stand out. Accuracy and attention to detail matter; I don’t want to hunt for missing fonts or relink images later.

Deliverables  
• Editable Adobe Illustrator (.AI) source  
• Print-ready PDF (CMYK, bleed, trim marks)  
• Folder with any custom fonts and linked assets

Please attach or link to two or three recent menu or restaurant-related designs so I can quickly gauge fit. Excited to collaborate and get this menu off to the printers soon!

title: UI Design for Web App
mcp_workflow: asset_search (Stock, mockup templates) → image_fill_area (apply design) → asset_preview_file
desc:
I'm seeking a skilled UI designer to create a modern and clean interface for our web application. The project needs to be completed within a month.

Key Requirements:
- Design a user-friendly and modern clean interface for our web application.
- Collaborate with me to understand the project requirements and user needs.
- Provide high-quality design mockups and prototypes.
- Ensure the design is responsive and works seamlessly across different devices and browsers.

Ideal Skills:
- Proven experience in UI design, particularly for web applications.
- Strong portfolio showcasing modern and clean design.
- Proficiency in design tools such as Figma, Sketch, or Adobe XD.
- Excellent communication skills and ability to meet deadlines.

Please share your portfolio along with your bids. Looking forward to your proposals!

title: Redesign Website
mcp_workflow: asset_search (Stock, mockup templates) → image_fill_area (apply design) → asset_preview_file
desc: We're refreshing the King Palm website to improve user experience and conversion across key pages. We're looking for a skilled web designer to lead a cohesive redesign that spans our landing page, category pages, product pages, cart, about us page, and magnet ad pages. What we need: A designer who can work from our existing Figma files and customer personas to create a unified, brand aligned experience. You'll be reworking and refining our current assets, using AI tools where it makes sense to enhance them. The goal is a design system that feels intentional and lets us swap hero assets or content easily without breaking the layout. The work includes designing mockups for all pages listed above, ensuring visual and functional consistency across the entire user journey. We'll be A slash B testing one design variation against our current site, so your work needs to be polished and ready for implementation. You should be comfortable working directly in Figma, understand conversion focused design, and have experience with e commerce sites. Your portfolio should show thoughtful, clean design work that balances brand voice with user needs.

title: Create banner design in PDF format
mcp_workflow: document_convert_pdf / document_merge_data_layout / document_render_layout → asset_preview_file
desc: I am exhibiting at conference and need to have 2 large banners printed. I have attached some files: 1. Banner Mockup: this contains the layout and copy. 2. Icons 3. Artwork templates (2.4 Metre width and 3 Metre width) I need some changes to the design: 1. Use Pantone 3252 C and Pantone 2767 C instead of the colors in the mockup: . 2. Use attached "Medbookr-inline.png" instead of the logo in the mockup. 3. Remove "Focus on people, not paperwork" subheading from below "Complex Simulated Patient Programmes. Made Simple." Plus one change for the smaller banner only (the 2.4m banner): 1. Replace all mentions of "Simulated Patient" with "SP". For example, it should say "Complex SP Programmes" instead of "Complex Simulated Patient Programmes", Deliverables: 1. PDF of design using 'artwork-template-2-4m.pdf' 2. PDF of design using 'artwork-template-3m.pdf'
